creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know about this coffee shop and bakery that’s hidden underneath a train station in London? Located in a railway arch under Peckham Rye station, you can see the trains going past and the people of the platform! Grab a coffee and pastry and watch the world go by, surrounded by gorgeous plants 🌱 

📍 @dovedalespeckham 212, Archway, 24 Blenheim Grove, London, SE15 4QL
⏰ Open 8am-5pm daily

transcription.text: Did you know about this coffee shop that's hidden underneath an actual train station in London? It's right under Peckham Rye Station and from the outdoor seating you can literally see people on the platform. There's seating inside the railway arch and they have a range of drinks and pastries on offer. There's lots of seating outside too, perfect in the sunshine and you can just watch the trains go by. This is Dovedale's in Peckham, share it with someone who would love to go.
